title: Sodium Boost
description: An elite, ultra-lightweight Fabric modpack engineered to maximize your Minecraft FPS and eliminate lag while maintaining a flawless vanilla experience. Packed with core optimization engines like Sodium, Lithium, and FerriteCore, it delivers smoother gamepl
body:
![sodium banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fde0367b262922214ad4a479bc19fd929c440b6_0.webp)
# 🪶 Minecraft Lightweight Modpack
**Sodium Boost** is an elite, performance-driven optimization pack meticulously engineered for purists who demand maximum frame rates without sacrificing the authentic vanilla Minecraft experience. 

Instead of cluttering your game with unnecessary features, this profile synthesizes top-tier, lightweight core engines—guaranteeing flawlessly fluid gameplay even on budget setups or low-spec hardware.

---

## ⚡ Elite Performance Features

* **🚀 Exponential FPS Gains:** Experience a massive 2x to 4x frame rate multiplier compared to the default stock vanilla client.
* **🔒 Pure Vanilla Parity:** 100% compliant with standard gameplay. Zero mechanical changes, zero forced world alterations.
* **✨ High-Fidelity Visuals:** Native, highly optimized shader support powered by the seamless integration of modern graphics frameworks.
* **🧠 Advanced Resource Allocation:** Intelligent memory optimization that keeps RAM overhead remarkably low and stable, preventing long-session stuttering.
* **🕊️ Zero Hardware Bloat:** Clean system integration, aggressive internal testing, and zero unnecessary scripts—just unadulterated speed.

---

## 🎯 Engineered For:

* **🛠️ Hardcore Builders & Survivalists** who want to build massive bases and explore heavy rendering distances entirely lag-free.
* **📹 Streamers & Content Creators** who need absolute stability and smooth frame pacing while recording high-bitrate gameplay.
* **🎮 Desktop Enthusiasts** who prefer the simplicity of vanilla Minecraft but want a modern, high-refresh-rate visual upgrade.

---

## 📥 Getting Started

1. **Grab the Profile:** Secure the latest `.mrpack` file from our versions tab.
2. **Deploy:** Import it instantly into your custom application launcher (*Modrinth App, Prism, ATLauncher, or MultiMC*).
3. **Launch:** Run the game and experience your world's ultimate performance threshold!

> ⚠️ *System Guidelines: Ensure you are running Java 21 or higher and have allocated a baseline of at least 4GB of RAM for optimal chunk caching.*
